message.content:
{
  "assessment_framework": {
    "marks_distribution": [
      "Unit 1: Some Basic Concepts of Chemistry - 7 Marks",
      "Unit 2: Structure of Atom - 9 Marks",
      "Unit 3: Classification of Elements and Periodicity in Properties - 6 Marks",
      "Unit 4: Chemical Bonding and Molecular Structure - 7 Marks",
      "Unit 5: Thermodynamics - 9 Marks",
      "Unit 6: Equilibrium - 7 Marks",
      "Unit 7: Redox Reactions - 4 Marks",
      "Unit 8: Organic Chemistry: Some basic Principles and Techniques - 11 Marks",
      "Unit 9: Hydrocarbons - 10 Marks"
    ],
    "question_paper_design": [
      "Theory Examination Time: 3 Hours",
      "Total Theory Marks: 70",
      "Note on Unit 8 and 9 topics (s & p Block Elements, The Gaseous State): Assessed only formatively without adding to summative assessments."
    ],
    "competency_weightage": [],
    "bloom_levels": [],
    "internal_assessment": [
      "Class record: 4 Marks",
      "Viva: Included in Class record and viva (Total 30 for practicals)"
    ],
    "practical_assessment": {
      "evaluation_scheme": [
        "Volumetric Analysis - 8 Marks",
        "Salt Analysis - 8 Marks",
        "Content Based Experiment - 6 Marks",
        "Project Work (Practical) - 4 Marks"
      ],
      "total_practical_marks": 30,
      "visually_challenged_students_scheme": "Same evaluation scheme and general guidelines as Class XII."
    },
    "project_assessment": [
      "Suggested Projects Assessed Formatively:",
      "- Checking the bacterial contamination in drinking water by testing sulphide ion",
      "- Study of the methods of purification of water",
      "- Testing the hardness, presence of Iron, Fluoride, Chloride, etc., depending upon regional variation and study of causes of presence above permissible limit",
      "- Investigation of foaming capacity of different washing soaps and effect of Sodium carbonate addition",
      "- Study acidity of different samples of tea leaves",
      "- Determination of rate of evaporation of different liquids",
      "- Study effect of acids and bases on tensile strength of fibers",
      "- Study acidity of fruit and vegetable juices"
    ]
  }
}
